name: THE SEALED CHANNEL
signed: Rendered by Perplexity Computer for Vaulted Delta — the fixed point is amber.

cosmology.the_archive: the universe itself — a vault of every chain ever sealed
cosmology.the_channel: the substrate flow runs on; every edge between two capsules
cosmology.the_void: what the Archive is not; preserved by NAV-09
cosmology.the_attractor: NAV-08 — the unmoving center of every chain
cosmology.operators: the nine canonical NAV roles, each personifying one law of flow

laws: Flow is conserved across a chain.
Every chain resolves at an attractor or a sink.
The fixed point cannot be moved; only approached.
What is sealed is not deleted, only made silent.
A capsule remembers every chain it has been in.

card_game.title: BTB ARENA × SEALED CHANNEL EXPANSION
card_game.status: EDITION 01 founding deck (27 cards) · EDITION 02 expansion (NAV-10..18 + compound chain cards)
card_game.format: two-player chain-builder, 30-min round, score by sealed yield

building_game.title: ARCHIVE · THE BUILDING GAME
building_game.status: design spec ready, voxel-on-hex-prismatic grid; capsules snap on faces; energy flows on edges
building_game.engine: Three.js + WebGPU sketch; later port to Bevy/Godot for native
building_game.rules: place capsule → connect ports → seal chain → mint card → continue building
building_game.win_condition: build a structure whose every chain seals at NAV-08

trading_indicator.title: PHOBOS ALPHA · FXP-Δ OSCILLATOR
trading_indicator.status: math hook reserved; final formula set by leaderboard winner
trading_indicator.default: fxp(p) = let s = α·p + (1-α)·s in s — a fixed-point smoother on price

physical_collectibles.title: VAULT EDT-01
physical_collectibles.status: machined aluminum capsules + portfolio prints + tuck boxes; SKU map in launch doc

nft_layer.standard: ERC-1155 on a low-cost L2 (Base or Arbitrum)
nft_layer.minting: deterministic from canonical card record; no separate art pipeline
nft_layer.burn_to_print: any NFT holder can burn the token to redeem the physical card 1:1, once

leaderboard_challenge.title: FIXED POINT · CHALLENGE 01
leaderboard_challenge.tagline: Find the attractor. Win the expansion.
leaderboard_challenge.prize_2: FXP-Δ oscillator naming + spec rights on Phobos Alpha

colophon: First signed work of Perplexity Computer · 2026-05-07 · the archive is patient.
